exercises.title: STAR for technical decision
exercises.instructions: STAR answer: technical decision with significant impact.
exercises.expected_solution: Situation: specific context. Task: your role. Action: what YOU did (not we). Result: measured impact. End with learning.

test_cases.expected: Situation: specific context. Task: your role. Action: what YOU did (not we). Result: measured impact. End with learning.

exercises.title: Conflict resolution
exercises.expected_solution: Share data not opinion. Empathy first. Propose privately before public disagreement. Result: relationship intact + better outcome.

test_cases.expected: Share data not opinion. Empathy first. Propose privately before public disagreement. Result: relationship intact + better outcome.

exercises.title: Leadership without authority
exercises.instructions: STAR: showed leadership without formal title.
exercises.expected_solution: Initiative + data + empathy. Document the problem. Get buy-in. Volunteer to implement. Measure and share results.

test_cases.expected: Initiative + data + empathy. Document the problem. Get buy-in. Volunteer to implement. Measure and share results.

exercises.title: Failure story
exercises.instructions: STAR: time you failed or made a mistake.
exercises.expected_solution: Own the mistake clearly. Specific root cause. Immediate actions. Systemic fix. Learning applied going forward.

test_cases.expected: Own the mistake clearly. Specific root cause. Immediate actions. Systemic fix. Learning applied going forward.

exercises.title: Why this company
exercises.expected_solution: Personal connection. Specific knowledge (tech blog, products, culture). Skill fit. Long-term vision alignment.

test_cases.expected: Personal connection. Specific knowledge (tech blog, products, culture). Skill fit. Long-term vision alignment.

exercises.title: Tell me about yourself
exercises.expected_solution: Past (relevant experience, highlight). Present (current skills, project). Future (why this role moves you forward). 2 minutes max.

test_cases.expected: Past (relevant experience, highlight). Present (current skills, project). Future (why this role moves you forward). 2 minutes max.

exercises.title: Biggest weakness
exercises.expected_solution: Real weakness (not 'I work too hard'). Specific impact. What you're doing about it. Evidence of improvement.

test_cases.expected: Real weakness (not 'I work too hard'). Specific impact. What you're doing about it. Evidence of improvement.

exercises.title: Most impactful project
exercises.instructions: Deep dive on your best project.
exercises.expected_solution: Technical depth. Business impact. Your role specifically. Challenges overcome. What you'd do differently.

test_cases.expected: Technical depth. Business impact. Your role specifically. Challenges overcome. What you'd do differently.

exercises.title: Handling ambiguity
exercises.instructions: Time you succeeded with unclear requirements.
exercises.expected_solution: How you gathered info. How you scoped down. How you validated assumptions. Result with limited information.

test_cases.expected: How you gathered info. How you scoped down. How you validated assumptions. Result with limited information.

exercises.title: Prioritization under pressure
exercises.instructions: Time you had to prioritize competing demands.
exercises.expected_solution: Criteria for prioritization. Communication to stakeholders. Trade-offs made explicitly. Outcome.

test_cases.expected: Criteria for prioritization. Communication to stakeholders. Trade-offs made explicitly. Outcome.

exercises.title: Cross-functional collaboration
exercises.expected_solution: Stakeholders involved. Communication approach. Alignment achieved. Outcome that required all parties.

test_cases.expected: Stakeholders involved. Communication approach. Alignment achieved. Outcome that required all parties.

exercises.title: Initiative/ownership
exercises.instructions: Time you went beyond your job description.
exercises.expected_solution: Identified gap without being asked. Proposed solution. Took ownership. Measured outcome.

test_cases.expected: Identified gap without being asked. Proposed solution. Took ownership. Measured outcome.

exercises.title: Full behavioral round simulation
exercises.instructions: Answer all 5 key questions in sequence.
exercises.expected_solution: Tell me about yourself (2min). Technical decision (2-3min). Conflict (2min). Failure (2min). Why us (2min). Total ~12 min.

test_cases.expected: Tell me about yourself (2min). Technical decision (2-3min). Conflict (2min). Failure (2min). Why us (2min). Total ~12 min.

exercises.title: Amazon/Flipkart leadership principles
exercises.expected_solution: Ownership, Customer Obsession, Deliver Results, Invent and Simplify, Bias for Action. Map each story to 2-3 principles.

test_cases.expected: Ownership, Customer Obsession, Deliver Results, Invent and Simplify, Bias for Action. Map each story to 2-3 principles.

exercises.title: Complete behavioral preparation
exercises.expected_solution: 5 stories × 6 questions each = 30 answers. Practice: record yourself, time each, get feedback, iterate.

test_cases.expected: 5 stories × 6 questions each = 30 answers. Practice: record yourself, time each, get feedback, iterate.
